title: capsicum dunalii
intro: Capsicum dunalii, a species of flowering plant in the nightshade family, is native to the tropical forests of Sri Lanka. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Capsicum dunalii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and provide relief from skin irritations and wounds. Herbal preparations of Capsicum dunalii include infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
